Hailing from the scenic town of Glintwater Banks, Dmitriy Savin has taken on the role of Family Wellness Advocate Hillmaze, emphasizing the importance of family health. He graduated from Riverpine Business College, where he gained key skills that are now applied in his job at Evergrain Innovations. Dmitriy's knowledge of Cree vocabulary significantly enhances his ability to engage with the community and foster connections within diverse families. His passion for volunteering shines through in every aspect of his advocacy work.
